summary: Explained why LIMIT orders can appear outside user-expected price ranges: IF Bid bounds only gate execution, not the submitted limit price; LIMIT uses literal or price_var+offset separately; only 1-99 clamp applies; NO bots remap Bid/Ask via 100-yes_ask / 100-yes_bid so numbers differ from YES UI.
